basic_details.job_title: ARI Pune Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: MACS-Agharkar Research Institute (ARI) Recruitment 2026: MACS-Agharkar Research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Relaxation applicable for OBC, SC, ST etc. as per Government of India regulations.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Microbiology\/Biotechnology\/Natural\/Agricultural Sciences or Diploma in Engineering or Technology, 1st Class M.Sc\/B.E.\/B.Tech\/M.Tech, Experience in carbohydrate profiling and enzyme kinetics
qualification.details: Bachelor Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Natural/Agricultural Sciences, Diploma in Engineering or Technology from a recognized college/University. Desirable: 1st Class M.Sc/B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech, Experience in carbohydrate profiling and enzyme kinetics, Establishment of enzyme substrate reactions and process parameters optimization, Pretreatment of lignocellulosic biomass and saccharification process, Experience in the design, execution and analysis of biochemical assays.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at ARI?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant post at MACS-Agharkar Research Institute is 23rd June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before submission.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelor Degree in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Natural/Agricultural Sciences or a Diploma in Engineering or Technology. A 1st Class M.Sc/B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech is desirable, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How is the selection process conducted for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at ARI will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 100/- for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant in this recruitment drive by MACS-Agharkar Research Institute.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant is on a contractual basis. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MACS-Agharkar Research Institute located?
faq.answer: MACS-Agharkar Research Institute (ARI) is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with a pincode of 411004.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. However, it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or if candidates from other states are also eligible.
